title: webdriverio@4.2.6 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [webdriverio](https://www.npmjs.com/package/webdriverio) just published its new version 4.2.6.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency webdriverio
New version 4.2.6
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As webdriverio is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 96 commits . - [`c4b3735`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/c4b37354819f01f39dbd8ce447e450c1c8a5f4f9) v4.2.6 - [`d027d1d`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/d027d1d921d3ff30dffed943928875da7076e8fb) Update contributors - [`54eed2c`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/54eed2ce6fdb62208d78c28003b793ff09c9de61) updated changelog - [`c6c46de`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/c6c46de5ce5bc08922db78e7c8dcdc3799aa3674) Merge pull request #1542 from paazmaya/1541-limit-files-npm-package - [`f29791a`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/f29791af57509eed774b8be0c635de6d113c6ff5) Remove lib and index.js from files list - [`5aa4d9c`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/5aa4d9c5dae72663d768c899f55beea781cf56d4) Add files list to limit :pig: getting to npm - [`7ad746f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/7ad746fcb287f51f23ba2ca447efd1cf899b6da3) Merge pull request #1537 from lisss/screenshot-event - [`0d2f3a8`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/0d2f3a809a4bf1800835cfc8987a6aa86eb31f85) Add 'screenshot' internal event to list of internal events - [`0b08a87`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/0b08a8796b64788709cacdf3d256716161f2e06a) v4.2.5 - [`74363ca`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/74363ca69e0fb7356bf218ae3343a72d1c4f8d9e) updated changelog - [`009b456`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/009b45619a8cdbec3fc2941d6af4945bfdeb7503) allow spec arg - closes #1533 - [`8c5ff0f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/8c5ff0f05745cdd2fafbf82e0343f0b74ecd24ff) v4.2.4 - [`95fafb3`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/95fafb31eea89aaff2c701a8db07642f2e6fc2a8) Update contributors - [`a6469c9`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/a6469c91efaa9bee1dd831a959c8b4e700f61e6b) updated changelog [ci skip] - [`8bd07dd`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/8bd07dd07d2701052395cd75ce8bb0e37cab3fd1) improved id regex - closes #1494 There are 96 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/9c24915faaff9e0b9ce75bbfcbcbee9bf0d8f349...c4b37354819f01f39dbd8ce447e450c1c8a5f4f9). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
